## What happened

A clear description of the actual behavior.

## What you expected

A clear description of the expected behavior.

## How to reproduce

1. Run `maverick ...`
2. Click / type ...
3. See error

## Environment

- Maverick version: `maverick version`
- Python version: `python --version`
- OS: (Linux / macOS / Windows)
- Provider(s) in use: (Anthropic / OpenAI / Ollama / session-* / ...)
- Sandbox: (local / docker / ssh)

## Logs

If you can, paste the last ~50 lines of `~/.maverick/audit/<today>.ndjson`
(redact anything sensitive) or the per-turn log from
`MAVERICK_LOG_TURNS=1` re-run.

```
(paste here)
```
